cards.title: Methodology, Not Just Design
cards.text: AI Business Studio London develops strategic AI architecture. Physical Fidelity Protocol™ extends beyond design — it is business strategy, brand structure, technology systems. We focus on disciplining visionary founders through rigor.

cards.title: Silver & Elegant Validates the Methodology
cards.text: We developed Physical Fidelity Protocol™ and applied it to Silver & Elegant. The result: SME Business Awards finalist in Business Innovation category. The methodology works. The brand proves it.

cards.title: 99% Geometric Accuracy
cards.text: Physical Fidelity Protocol™ achieved 99% accuracy between digital intent and physical reality in precious metalwork. This is not aesthetic novelty — it is structural precision. The same rigor now applies to business architecture.

cards.title: From Silver & Elegant to Strategy
cards.text: Silver & Elegant is not a separate practice — it is the laboratory where Physical Fidelity Protocol™ was engineered. Every principle we apply to your business was first tested in constraint, precision, and permanence.

cards.title: Physical Fidelity Protocol™ Achieves 99% Accuracy
cards.text: Between digital intent and physical reality in precious metalwork. This is not aesthetic novelty — it is structural precision. The same rigor now applies to business architecture.

cards.title: Finalist: Business Innovation
cards.text: Silver & Elegant selected as finalist, SME Hertfordshire Business Awards 2026. The recognition: Physical Fidelity Protocol™ is a methodology that advances how business itself operates — not just how products are made. Grand final September 2026.
